title: horsfieldia polyspherula var. sumatrana
intro: Horsfieldia polyspherula var. sumatrana is a plant species in the family Annonaceae, native to Southeast Asia and known for its medicinal properties. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Horsfieldia polyspherula var. sumatrana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
